A. Jeanne Jorge, Esq. of Goldstein, Gellman, Melbostad, et al, 415-673-5600
for defendant /cross-complainant and opposing party Justin McKendry.

RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling:
CROSS DEFENDANT MIKE BORIES' Motion To Strike Portions Of Cross-Complaint;
1) AS TO THE WORD "COMMON" - DENIED.
2) AS TO ALLEGATIONS RELATED TO METHAMPHATMINE ABUSE - GRANTED IRRELEVANT.
3) AS TO PARAGRAPGH 18 - GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD CONDUCT ONLY.
4) AS TO PARAGRAPH 31 - GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND.
5) AS TO PARAGRAPH 43 - DENEID - ALLEGATIONS DO NOT CONTAIN PRIVILEGED INFORMATION.
6) AS TO PARAGRAPHES 53-59 - GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
Judge Paul Alvarado, Reporter Robert Balian, CSR # 5220. (301/PHA/DM)
